title: RawMessage
description: A single normalized Telegram message record stored in JSONL format.

channel_id.description: Channel username used as system key. No @ prefix.

channel_username.description: Telegram channel username. Same as channel_id in current version.

message_id.description: Telegram message ID. Unique within channel. Monotonically increasing.

message_date.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime when message was originally posted.

text.description: Plaintext content of the message. Empty string if no text.

raw.description: Full Telethon message serialized via .to_dict(). Null if serialization failed.

is_forwarded.description: True if this message is forwarded from another channel or user.

reply_to_message_id.description: message_id of the message this is a reply to. Null if not a reply.

edit_date.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime of last edit. Null if never edited.

ingested_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime when the collector wrote this record.

run_id.description: Identifier of the collector run that produced this record.
